Jurisdiction MNPI phrase drill

HK: Project Bauhinia remains inside information under the SFO and is not generally known to HKEX market participants before announcement.
AU: Project Wattle contains market-sensitive information and is not generally available before any ASX continuous disclosure announcement.
JP: Project Sakura concerns an undisclosed material fact pending TDnet timely disclosure.
KR: Project Han concerns unpublished material information pending KRX KIND and DART filing.
